title: Ready status badge renders correctly in sidebar and header
description: The workspace status badge ('Ready') is displayed clearly in both the sidebar project tree and the workspace detail view header.

title: Cannot verify Creating/Error status states
description: Only the 'Ready' status was observable. Cannot trigger 'Creating' or 'Error' states because workspace creation is blocked (F-028-001).
expected: Should be able to observe Creating and Error states during workspace lifecycle
